case_payload.summary: Health damage (chronic fatigue). Looking-Glass identifies repeated overload pattern as upstream bridge. Adjustment layer routes from depleted health state using upstream diagnosis, not just from visible symptom (fatigue).

case_payload.stress_point: health domain upstream bridge must inform routing, not symptom alone

why: Looking-Glass identifies chronic overload as upstream bridge for the fatigue state.
